content:
# Best AI Audio Tools for DJ Mixing in 2026

DJ mixing is an art, but AI tools can help you create better mixes faster!

Check out our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/200|Suno]]: AI-Generated Music & Remixes

[[link:/tools/200|Suno]] can create original tracks and remixes perfect for DJ sets.

### Suno for DJs
- **Create edits**: Make your own edits and remixes
- **Genre blending**: Create perfect transitions between styles
- **Unique tracks**: Create one-of-a-kind original music

**Try Suno**: https://suno.ai

---

## [[link:/tools/79|Descript]]: Audio Editing for DJs

[[link:/tools/79|Descript]] helps you edit your recorded mixes with text-based editing.

### Descript for DJs
- **Easy editing**: Fix mistakes in your recordings
- **Audio cleaning**: Make your recordings sound professional
- **Podcast-ready**: Perfect for sharing mixes online

**Try Descript**: https://descript.com
